question: Give me the list of the recordings made in 2014 by Harmonia Mundi with
sparql:
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX efrbroo: <http://erlangen-crm.org/efrbroo/>
PREFIX dct: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/>
PREFIX ecrm: <http://erlangen-crm.org/current/>
SELECT ?work ?workLabel WHERE { ?work a efrbroo:F22_Self-Contained_Expression ; efrbroo:R17_created ?creationEvent ; dct:created "2014"^^xsd:gYear . ?creationEvent ecrm:P14_carried_out_by <http://data.doremus.org/artist/9d783254-9816-30ef-bb2a-f5ee89a07ea6> . }
execution_result: Got no rows and 2 columns in 0.02s
